calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Marlene Pappas Getchell, Esq. appearing for Ernest Morgan (Petitioner/Administrator of the estate of Annette Morgan Druhet).
Jeff Czech, Esq. appearing for Miriam Druhet Johnson.

The Court inquired as to why this petition was not filed in the older case. Ms. Getchell provided a brief background regarding the marriage of Harvey Druhet and Annette Morgan Druhet, stated that she represents the personal representative in Annette's estate, that there was one property in San Francisco, that there was an issue, that she got a judgment to quiet title, and that she filed this petition to move things along.

At the conclusion of comments, the Court on its own motion consolidated case no. PES-14-298253; the Estate of Harvey Druhet with case no. PES-22-305626; the Estate of Harvey Druhet. The lead case is PES-14-298253. The Court set status on close of the estate in case no. PES-14-298253 for June 12, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

The Court stated that it had no issues and took the Petition for Spousal Property under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
